name: Pumpernickel Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup strong coffee in place of water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix together the yeast, flour, caraway seeds, and baking chocolate.
3. Add the molasses and coffee, stirring until a dough forms.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
5. Use white bread setting with crust setting at 10:00.
